description: Ambiguous meeting time on Tuesday. With memory: defaults to afternoon (2pm). Without memory: defaults to morning (9am).

events.title: Project Proposal Review with Bob
events.reasoning: Alice and Bob agreed to meet next Tuesday to review the project proposal. Based on Alice's preference for afternoon meetings around 2-3pm, scheduling at 2pm.
events.assumptions: Defaulting to 2pm based on Alice's known afternoon preference.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 meeting event for Tuesday afternoon.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'next Tuesday' resolves to 2026-02-24. Delta: start_time and end_time differ (afternoon vs morning).
